member.name: T:SoochakBharat.SDK.Api.LocalApiServer
member.summary: Minimal HttpListener-based local API surface for querying readers and tags. Not intended for Internet exposure; bind to localhost only.

member.name: T:SoochakBharat.SDK.Concurrency.TagCache
member.summary: Thread-safe tag de-duplication cache keyed by EPC (and optionally antenna).

member.name: M:SoochakBharat.SDK.Concurrency.TagCache.Upsert(SoochakBharat.SDK.Models.TagData,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Upserts a tag. If the EPC exists, read counts are aggregated. Returns the current snapshot of the tag.

member.name: M:SoochakBharat.SDK.Core.ReaderFactory.AutoDetectAsync(SoochakBharat.SDK.Models.Options.ReaderConnectionOptions)
member.summary: Auto-detect readers: 1) Scan Serial COM ports for SIM3500 2) Try IP addresses (SIM3500 first, then LLRP)

member.name: T:SoochakBharat.SDK.IReaderManager
member.summary: Abstraction for managing one or more reader adapters in a thread-safe way.

member.name: T:SoochakBharat.SDK.Models.InventoryStats
member.summary: Rolling statistics for inventory performance. Computed client-side from tag events.

member.name: T:SoochakBharat.SDK.Models.ReaderInfo
member.summary: Lightweight description of a connected reader instance.

member.name: T:SoochakBharat.SDK.ReaderManagerService
member.summary: Default implementation of for managing multiple adapters. Thread-safe, designed for UI + LocalApiServer consumption.
